Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class BridgeDevToolsOverlay

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.dll

An Avalonia panel that hosts the Bridge DevTools overlay, displaying real-time bridge call logs, payloads, latency metrics, and error details.

Place this in a Avalonia.Controls.Grid alongside the main WebView and call Attach(WebView, IBridgeTracer?) to wire it up: 

<Grid>
  <agw:WebView x:Name="WebView" />
  <agw:BridgeDevToolsOverlay x:Name="DevToolsOverlay"
    VerticalAlignment="Bottom" Height="300" IsVisible="False" />
</Grid>
public sealed class BridgeDevToolsOverlay : ContentControl, INotifyPropertyChanged, IDataContextProvider, ILogical, IThemeVariantHost, IResourceHost, IResourceNode, IStyleHost, ISetLogicalParent, ISetInheritanceParent, ISupportInitialize, INamed, IInputElement, IDataTemplateHost, ISetterValue, IDisposable

Fields

DefaultToggleGesture

Default keyboard gesture for toggling the overlay: F12.

public static readonly KeyGesture DefaultToggleGesture

Field Value

KeyGesture

Properties

Collector

The underlying event collector for direct access.

public IBridgeEventCollector? Collector { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeEventCollector

Tracer

The underlying tracer. Wire this into your bridge service.

public IBridgeTracer? Tracer { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeTracer

Methods

Attach(WebView, IBridgeTracer?)

Attaches the overlay to a WebView, wiring the devtools tracer into its bridge and loading the overlay HTML.

public void Attach(WebView targetWebView, IBridgeTracer? existingTracer = null)

Parameters

targetWebView WebView

The WebView whose bridge calls will be traced. Must have its bridge enabled before calling this.

existingTracer IBridgeTracer

Optional existing tracer to chain (events forwarded to both).

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

RegisterToggleShortcut(Control, KeyGesture?)

Registers a keyboard shortcut on the given root control to toggle this overlay. Defaults to DefaultToggleGesture (F12).

public void RegisterToggleShortcut(Control root, KeyGesture? gesture = null)

Parameters

root Control

The control to attach the key binding to (typically the top-level window or panel).

gesture KeyGesture

Keyboard gesture that triggers the toggle. Pass null to use DefaultToggleGesture.

Toggle()

Toggles the overlay visibility.

public void Toggle()
